name: Winter Vegetable Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 medium Carrots (parred and cut into 1/2 inch slices)
3 Ribs Celery, sliced in half inches
6 ounces Fresh Spinach (trimmed, rinsed and torn into bite sized pieces)
recipeInstructions:
1. Par the carrots and cut into 1/2 inch slices; potatoes into 1/2 inch chunks. Trim, rinse and tear the spinach into bite sized pieces.
2. Heat oil in a large saucepan or Dutch oven over medium heat. Add carrots, celery, onion, garlic and thyme. Cook, stirring frequently until slightly softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add barley and rice; stir to coat. Stir in broth, 2 cups water, potatoes and tomatoes. Cover and bring to boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium low; simmer covered, skimming and stirring occasionally for 1 hour.
5. Stir in spinach, salt and pepper; simmer covered for an additional 3 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
